name: Jerry Lewis' Granny's Vinegar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs and blend well.
3. Incorporate the vanilla, then add the melted chocolate and blend.
4. Sift in the flour thoroughly.
5. Alternately fold in the sour milk and flour mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
6. Mix together the vinegar and baking soda, then incorporate them into the batter and beat until combined.
7. Pour the batter evenly into two greased and floured 9-inch layer cake pans.
8. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
